programmes.show_description: Gym addict Sophie from Surrey is looking for a change from the usual body-builder types who lack sparkle, while Dom seeks his perfect man to waltz him down the aisle.
Brand new series: The dinner party descends into chaos when a shock return re-ignites old feuds and exposes fresh cracks in multiple marriages.
Britain's sharpest armchair critics watch: Banged Up: Stars Behind Bars, Planet Earth, Bake Off, Culprits, The Curse of Robert the Doll and much more.
Angst-Giving: Pop-Pop and Uncle Marvin each find a way to disrupt Beverly's best-laid Thanksgiving plans.
The Beverly Goldberg Cookbook, Part 2: When a publisher shows interest in her recipes, Beverly prepares to finally realise her dream of writing a cookbook.
Bride Hayley wanted a classic Jewish wedding, but groom Ben wanted one in a hot tub. Did his plans leave Hayley with that sinking feeling?
Perfect Pairs: Phil, Claire, Alex and Luke love looking after the twins, but find it exhausting. But then they realise that the babies might be useful for their to-do lists...
Pool Party: Mitch and Cam help Lily overcome her insecurities about wearing a bathing suit to a pool party, but discover that they have their own self-doubts.
A short, cheeky clip featuring animals and food, from the always hilarious Tube that is Rude.
Mike and Nellie's: In Oakhurst, Gordon Ramsay helps the overwhelmed owner of Mike and Nellie's restaurant, who lost his way when his father and business partner died.
Pickleball: Under pressure to beef up his CV, Adam tries out for William Penn's pickleball team. Beverly's determined to give Murray an epic birthday bash.
Game Night: When he befriends the most popular girl in school, Adam turns to the cool new guidance counsellor for advice.
Moon Landing: Claire feels slightly inadequate when her old friend, Valerie (guest star Minnie Driver), visits and is nothing like Claire remembered.
My Funky Valentine: Phil and Claire break from their traditional Valentine's Day dinner date and plan a little role play excursion. And Jay and Gloria's ideas of romance clash.
From Russia Without Love: Bart orders a Russian bride for Moe. She turns Moe's life around, and he falls in love.
Daddicus Finch: Lisa reads To Kill a Mockingbird and begins to observe wonderful similarities between Homer and Atticus Finch.
Mad About the Toy: A startling secret from Grampa's past takes him to Texas to find a long-lost life.
Can cocktail mixer Jack stir Alice's feelings? Will beautician Sophie and party girl Tori bridge the age gap? And might sparks fly when dog groomer Brenna meets electrician Ross?
El Greco: Gordon Ramsay visits struggling Greek restaurant El Greco, where the owners have secretly recruited 'Chef Mike' the microwave to help them out on a daily basis.
Crook and Ladder: When members of the Springfield fire department are injured, Homer, Moe, Apu and Skinner volunteer to be temporary firefighters.
Stop or My Dog Will Shoot: After rescuing Homer from a corn maze, Santa's Little Helper is recruited as a police dog and is teamed up with grizzled veteran cop Lou.
Family Portrait: It's family picture day and everything that can go wrong, does.
The Old Wagon: Claire finally gets Phil to agree to sell their old station wagon, but not before everyone takes it on one last ride down memory lane.
From Russia Without Love: Bart orders a Russian bride for Moe. She turns Moe's life around, and he falls in love.
Daddicus Finch: Lisa reads To Kill a Mockingbird and begins to observe wonderful similarities between Homer and Atticus Finch.
Mad About the Toy: A startling secret from Grampa's past takes him to Texas to find a long-lost life.
Brendan's action-packed expedition ends with an unforgettable day of thrill-seeking and luxury, before the celebs cast their final vote. Who will be the winners?
The Day the Earth Stood Cool: Homer persuades a hipster couple to move in next door, but their friendship soon starts to deteriorate...
To Cur with Love: Homer loses Santa's Little Helper but doesn't seem to care, until Grampa tells the story of Homer's long-lost childhood pup Bongo.
A Made Maggie: Marge sends Homer to find a godfather for an as-yet-unbaptised Maggie. And who'd make a better godfather than mafia don Fat Tony?
The Dad Who Knew Too Little: Homer hires a detective to spy on Lisa so he can get to know her better. But when Homer doesn't pay him, the detective frames Lisa for a crime.
Will it be game over at the First Dates restaurant in Bath when gamer Greg hears no-nonsense Mercedes's jaw-dropping revelation?
(2019) Keanu Reeves returns for the third time as the supposedly retired hitman. Someone's put a contract on John Wick's head and only a mystic in Morocco can lift it.
(2011) Comedy with Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, Blake Harrison and James Buckley. School is over, so the boys celebrate with an outrageous lads holiday in Crete.
Psychology student Alesia is tired of dating 'boys' and hopes to meet a real man in the buff. And after 200 dates all over the world, Louise is ready to meet her soulmate.
The Goggleboxers have been watching The Crown, Survivor, 007: Road to a Million, The Good Ship Murder and Shoplifters: Caught Red Handed.
It's a Wonderful Life: When Beverly signs everyone up for a holiday family photo, Geoff is excited to join in - despite Erica's reservations.
Pickleball: Under pressure to beef up his CV, Adam tries out for William Penn's pickleball team. Beverly's determined to give Murray an epic birthday bash.
Game Night: When he befriends the most popular girl in school, Adam turns to the cool new guidance counsellor for advice.
Back in 2014, Jack was hoping to plan a theatrical big day for groom James. Was it A Midsummer Night's Dream? Or did it turn out to be a Comedy of Errors? (Ep20)
Penultimate Challenge: The teams build something to replace a horse on a carousel at Luna Park amusement park. The builds must survive on the rotating carousel.
Cheeky clips from Rude Tube's naughty little sister Rude(ish) Tube, featuring weddings, space and sci-fi fans.
Brand new series: In India's city of love, Agra, the remaining racers battle exhaustion, extreme heat and even a monsoon. But will learning a Bollywood dance be a step too far?
Brand new series: Does Jazz have feelings for Inga? Jules and Tristan are furious with Chuggs. Freddy's back in Beks' bad books. Alice and Sam Vanderpump throw their baby shower.
Lela's: In California, Gordon Ramsay visits Lela's, a fine dining restaurant run by inexperienced owner Lela and young chef Ricky. Can Gordon save them from complete disaster?
Brand new series: The first Commitment Ceremony brings some brutal honesty. And the simmering tensions between the brides erupt into a fiery showdown.
Brand new series: The brides are torn over Stella and Brook's fallout. And the start of Intimacy Week spells disaster for a bride whose groom refuses to kiss her.
for Stand Up To Cancer: Joe Wilkinson, Roisin Conaty, Rose Matafeo, Judi Love, Tom Davis and Jon Richardson recreate the weirdest places that they've ever slept, in cake form!
(1995) Tom Hanks and Tim Allen star in the trailblazing, Oscar-winning family animation about toys that come to life and get into all kinds of scrapes when their kid's not looking.
Lisa's Sax: The family recall the story of when Lisa got her saxophone. It all started when the school psychologist told Marge and Homer that her talent needed to be nurtured...
Bart Star: Homer takes over as the manager of Bart's American football team after forcing Ned to quit the position. Guest starring Mike Judge as Hank Hill.
The Cartridge Family: Marge and Lisa are horrified when Homer buys a gun. And when Bart and Milhouse find it in the fridge, Marge takes the kids to live in a motel.
(2019) Adventure comedy sequel with Dwayne Johnson, Jack Black, Kevin Hart and Karen Gillan. The old school pals enter the Jumanji video game again to save their friend.
This time, the celebs watch: Love Island, Shania Twain at Glastonbury, The Nevermets, The Yorkshire Vet, This Morning (Cuddle Therapy) and ITV News (Biden v Trump).
The series continues with Stranger Things, Strictly, Celebrity Scam Interceptors, Malice, Songs of Praise, CBeebies Bedtime Stories and Animals on Drugs.
This time the Goggleboxers watch: Strictly, Changing Ends, One Shot with Ed Sheeran, All Her Fault, The Marvellous Miniature Workshop and Sara Davies' Christmas Craft Off.
